name: magequery
description: Magento 2 DI resolution, plugins, events and config answers inside the editor: doctor diagnostics, go-to-definition and hover in di.xml/events.xml/webapi.xml, reverse-DI references, plugin code lenses.

magequery.serverPath.description: Path to the magequery binary. Leave empty to use `magequery` from PATH, falling back to a download from GitHub releases.

magequery.checkForUpdates.description: On startup, check GitHub for a newer magequery server release and prompt to update. Only applies to a binary the extension downloaded itself — a binary from PATH or `magequery.serverPath` is left for you to update.

scripts.package: npm run typecheck && npm run build -- --minify && vsce package
